casting_time.value: 1 standard action 1 standard action 1 standard action

components.value: V, S, M (either a pinch of dried carrot or an agate) V, S, M (either a pinch of dried carrot or an agate)

description.value: The subject gains the ability to see 60 feet even in total darkness. Darkvision is black and white only but otherwise like normal sight. Darkvision can be made permanent with a permanency spell. Darkvision, Communal This spell functions like darkvision, except you may divide the duration in 1-hour intervals among the creatures touched.
